# MEFS Score Result File
# Planet FITS file:   ifs_im.planet.fits
# Scenesum FITS file: ifs_im.scenesum.fits
# Pixel scale (CDELT): 0.5000 lambda/D
# Ref Pixel (CRPIX):  (16.50, 16.50)
# Format:
# Col 1:  Pixel Rank index (1-based, ordered by decreasing planet intensity)
# Col 2:  X coordinate (lambda/D)
# Col 3:  Y coordinate (lambda/D)
# Col 4:  Planet intensity (ifs_im.planet.fits)
# Col 5:  Total intensity (ifs_im.scenesum.fits)
# Col 6:  Difference (Total - Planet, non-planet light)
# Col 7:  Cumulative Planet intensity
# Col 8:  Cumulative Total intensity
# Col 9:  Cumulative Difference intensity
# Col 10: SNR for this pixel
# Col 11: Cumulative SNR
# Col 12: Row index
# Col 13: Col index
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
